title: Germany Student Visa Journey
description: Comprehensive roadmap for international students applying for a German National Visa (D-Visa) for study purposes.

steps.name: Research & Choose University
steps.description: Identify programs that match your background. Check if your degree is recognized in Germany (Anabin database).
actions: Search for programs on DAAD website

steps.name: Submit University Applications
steps.description: Apply directly or via Uni-Assist. Ensure all documents are certified and translated.

steps.name: Secure Admission Letter
steps.description: Receive the Zulassungsbescheid (Admission Letter) or a letter of applicant status.

steps.name: Open Blocked Account (Sperrkonto)
steps.description: Proof of financial means is required (approx. €11,208/year). Common providers: Expatrio, Fintiba, Coracle.

steps.name: Health Insurance & Documents
steps.description: Organize student health insurance (public or private) and gather all civil documents.

steps.name: Book Visa Appointment
steps.description: Schedule your appointment at the German Embassy (Islamabad) or Consulate (Karachi).
actions: Book the correct category (National Visa - Study)

steps.name: Prepare for Interview
steps.description: Review your motivation letter and be ready to explain your choice of Germany, the university, and the course.
steps.success: Fully prepared for the consular interview

steps.name: Attend Visa Interview
steps.description: Submit your documents, provide fingerprints, and pay the visa fee (€75).
actions: Arrive 15 mins early at the embassy/consulate
steps.success: Interview completed and visa fee paid

steps.name: Visa Approval & Travel
steps.description: Receive your visa in the passport and book your flight to Germany.

steps.name: City Registration & Enrollment
steps.description: Register your address (Anmeldung) and enroll at the university in person.
steps.success: Official student status in Germany confirmed
